title: Saturated
description: A Resource Pack for Minecraft that makes the game look slightly more vibrant!
body:
# Saturated

Saturated is a Resource Pack for Minecraft Java Edition that makes the game look slightly more vibrant!

This pack is also available for [Bedrock Edition.](https://enchanted.games/projects/bedrock-resourcepacks/saturated-bedrock)

All types of textures are more vibrant including:
- GUIs
- Items
- Blocks
- Entities
- Menu Buttons
- Hotbar and Effect icons
